title: Director of New Republic Intelligence

The '''Director of New Republic Intelligence''' ('''DNRI'''), also known as '''Supreme Commander of Intelligence''',<ref name="WBC">[[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']]</ref> and '''Secretary of Intelligence''',<ref name="GG8">''[[Galaxy Guide 8: Scouts]]''</ref> was the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic General Ministry|General Ministry]] official subject to the authority, direction and control of the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State of the New Republic]] who was responsible for serving as the principal adviser to the Chief of State, the [[Senate Defense Council/Legends|Defense Council]] and [[Council on Security and Intelligence]] for intelligence matters related to the Republic's security, and overseeing and directing the [[New Republic Intelligence Service|intelligence program]] of the New Republic.

DNRI presumably held final responsibility for all NRIS operations, excluding from which he was protected by plausible deniability, such as [[Alpha Blue]]'s operations.

When the New Republic transitioned into the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], the Director of New Republic Intelligence became the [[Director of Galactic Alliance Intelligence]].

==Directors of New Republic Intelligence==
*[[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]], [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]–[[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]
*[[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]], [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]–[[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]
*[[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]], [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]–[[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]
*[[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]], [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]—[[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]]
*[[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]], [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]]–[[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]
*[[Dif Scaur]], [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]–[[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]
